commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the shared agent system prompt and focused prompt tests to tell generated-media completions to use message-tool attachments or own-line MEDIA directives depending on source delivery mode.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +17. Total +19 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection and the related prior PR show current main has the generated-media contract in runtime guidance but not the proposed explicit shared system-prompt wording.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] No automated repair is identified; maintainer handling should decide whether the focused tests are enough or whether prompt snapshot/live generated-media proof is needed before merge.

target.title: fix: clarify generated media reply prompts
target.body:
## Summary
- move generated-media delivery guidance into the shared system prompt instead of a Discord skill
- tell message-tool-only sessions to pass generated media as message-tool media/attachments
- tell automatic source delivery sessions to emit generated media as own-line MEDIA directives

## Verification
- pnpm test src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts
- git diff --check

## Notes
- Replaces #88436, which was closed because the guidance is shared visible-reply behavior, not Discord-specific skill behavior.
- `pnpm prompt:snapshots:check` was attempted twice but the generator spun at 100% CPU without output for more than three minutes; killed the local validation process. The changed strings are covered by focused system prompt tests.
target.author: steipete
